revision.comment: 1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Translated_page/doc]]: I am planning on using this template

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "Pages with incorrect translated page tag" to "Pages with translated page tag"
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24984760715|time triggered pipeline]]
